plans.Death Benefit Formula: Higher of (a) Sum Assured on Death or (b) 10x Annual Premium + Vested SRB + FAB. SA on Death = higher of 125% BSA or 10x AP
plans.Death Benefit Min Guarantee: 105% of total premiums paid (excl taxes/rider/extra)
plans.Post Maturity Death Benefit: N/A - Coverage ends at maturity
plans.Maturity Benefit Formula: Basic Sum Assured + Vested Simple Reversionary Bonuses + Final Additional Bonus (if any)
plans.Survival Benefit: N/A - No periodic survival payouts

plans.Simple Reversionary Bonus: Yes - Declared annually per ₹1000 SA (FY25: ~₹40-46 per ₹1000)
plans.Final Additional Bonus: Yes - One-time at claim (death or maturity)
plans.Loyalty Addition: Yes - After completing 5 policy years
plans.Surrender After Years: 1 year (SSV); 2 years (GSV)
plans.GSV Formula: Total premiums paid × GSV factor (varies by policy year and term). Excl 1st yr premium, taxes, rider, extra
plans.SSV Available: Yes - Higher of GSV or SSV is payable
plans.Loan Available: Yes - After policy acquires surrender value
plans.Loan Interest Rate: 9.50% p.a. compounding half-yearly (FY 2024-25)
plans.Loan Max Percent: Up to 90% of surrender value
plans.Available Riders: AD&D Rider (512B209V02); Accident Benefit Rider (512B203V03); Term Assurance Rider (512B210V02); Premium Waiver Rider (512B204V04). Max 2 riders; combined rider premium ≤30% of base
plans.Section 10_10D: Yes - Maturity/death proceeds tax-exempt (subject to conditions)
plans.GST Applicable: 4.50% on first year premium; 2.25% on renewal premiums
plans.Settlement Option: Yes - Maturity benefit in instalments over 5/10/15 years
plans.Revival Period: 5 consecutive years from first unpaid premium (before maturity)
